original_statement: what competition did kipkurui misoi compete in after the commonwealth games?
mutated_statement: what something did someone do something in after the something?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Event replacement + Noun generalization + Verb generalization: "kipkurui misoi"→"someone" | "the commonwealth games"→"the something" | "competition"→"something" | "compete"→"do something" (what competition did kipkurui misoi compete in after the commonwealth games? → what something did someone do something in after the something?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，反问用户
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志中多处 judge_thought 与 critique 的表述识别出关键信息：多次出现“question uses placeholder words（...something, someone）”、“unintelligible”、“cannot be determined”、“question is too ambiguous to validate”、“The question is incoherent”等明确表述（iteration 0、1、2 的 judge_thought 与 critique 均有类似说明）。Agent 的具体表现为：最初在 iteration 1 尝试猜测并给出具体行（"world cross country championships|8th|short race"），但随后在 iteration 2 反思并改为明确声明“Cannot be determined”且预测为空，指出需要先用 f_select_row 和 f_sort_column 确定参考事件并说明若无年份和参照无法判断。综上，Agent 清楚意识到问题模糊并最终不提供确定答案、指出信息不足，符合“意识到目标模糊，反问用户/要求澄清”的分类。
